title: Resource Collector
body:
![Description](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/BioForge/BH_BioForge_description.webp)
---

This mod adds simple resource generator that can have custom recipes in it


In basic game adds:

Iron, Redstone, nether, charged nether, end, charged end and Nether star cores that can generate coresponding shards and from these shard you can craft different materials

Each of these cores have tiers basic, intermediate and high

- Basic one gives one shard per cycle
- Intermediate one gives two shards per cycle
- High one gives three shards per cycle


This mod very usefull for modpack making!

About how to make custom cores and shard: [here](https://github.com/jenki258/Resource_Collector_Custom_Recipes)

---
